race.comment: SPICY LU (2) came back in trip and recorded a gutsy win in the Listed Princess on a bog track at Eagle Farm a fortnight ago. Very capable filly at this level and with a comfortable lead a distinct possibility she can get away with another one. NIGHTLINE (3) is the obvious threat after flashing home late to just miss out behind SPICY LU when resuming over the mile last time. Won up to 2100m last prep so getting out to this distance second-up looks ideal. ZULEIKA (4) continued her outstanding recent form when she progressed to Saturday company and got the cash over 2020m at Doomben last start. Given a four-week break to come back in trip. Just needs luck from a poor gate to be right in contention. NZ Oaks placegetter SINGLE RED (1) won as she liked last time at $1.40 over the mile at Te Rapa. Respect the Forsman stable bringing one across. SHE MOVES TOO (5) split SPICY LU and NIGHTLINE last start and she looks ready for a first try beyond a mile.
